lead_profile_text: 2-bed unfurnished house, Hanley, Stoke-on-Trent. Currently tenanted — family with young children leaving mid-to-late July 2026. Primary motivation: better returns than long-let and flexibility to sell. Actively interested in acquiring more properties to short-let. Original first-pass intelligence entry.
emotional_profile: Expansion-minded lead. Primary conversion gate is income consistency. Building a detailed business case with specific interest in multiple expansion markets (Manchester, Liverpool, Leeds). Flexibility to sell is a stated priority alongside income.
delay_trigger_phrases: hasn't inspected in a while — condition unknown
delay_timeline: Tenant out mid-to-late July; setup August; realistic go-live September 2026
green_light_trigger_phrases: actively looking to buy more properties

top_objections.text: Can I expect consistent income every month? — primary stated concern
top_objections.zac_response: Monthly range shown: £1,084 (Jan) to £2,129 (Aug). October half term / Alton Towers anchor. All months above bills.

top_objections.text: Wanted to understand the full costs before committing
top_objections.zac_response: Bills ~£400/month shared; management fee 13%+VAT; setup and furnishing costs outlined.

top_objections.text: Interest in other cities suggests she is still evaluating the overall STL model
top_objections.zac_response: Manchester strong; Liverpool selective; Leeds strong; Scotland ruled out. Cities near hospitals/universities/transport hubs perform reliably.

top_questions.text: What markets work well for STL portfolio expansion?
top_questions.answer: Manchester: strong. Liverpool: good weekends, weak weekdays. Leeds: strong. Scotland: ruled out due to licensing.

top_questions.text: What are the monthly costs I am responsible for?
top_questions.answer: ~£400/month covering gas, electric, water, WiFi, council tax — all owner responsibility.

what_moved_them: Specific monthly range (£1,084–£2,129) helped ground the income picture
Flexibility to sell while managing on STL directly relevant to her situation
Expansion portfolio angle matched her growth mindset
13%+VAT offer with clear deadline created concrete decision point

conversion_gaps.gap: Unfurnished property requires setup investment and tenant move-out before going live
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send setup guide immediately; confirm exact tenant move-out date; target September go-live for October Alton Towers half-term peak.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT expires 1 July 2026. October half term framing as first peak anchor. Portfolio fee progression path as expansion incentive.
zac_close_phrase: Confirm the tenant move-out date and sign before 1 July to lock in 13% — we can have you live in September for October half term
zac_income_intro: Net ~£1,650/month average (~£19,700/year), nightly rate ~£159, occupancy ~65%. Range from ~£1,084 in January to ~£2,129 in August.
zac_transition_phrases: Cities near hospitals, universities, and transport hubs perform reliably
Flexibility to sell — we manage the property while you keep your exit options open
zac_reassurance_phrases: Consistent income every month — even January at £1,084 is well above your £400/month bills
